name: Wheat State
description_short: This is not a financial services company. The website is Britannica's encyclopedia entry on wheat (the cereal grain), not a consumer finance provider.
description_long: CRITICAL FINDING: 'Wheat State' does not appear to exist as a financial services company. The provided website URL (https://www.britannica.com/plant/wheat) redirects to Britannica's encyclopedia article on wheat, the cereal grain plant (genus Triticum). The content exclusively covers agricultural and nutritional information about wheat crops, including production methods, grain composition, bread-making uses, and celiac disease—not financial services of any kind. There is no company information, contact details, loan products, terms, or consumer finance offerings anywhere on this page. The categorization as 'payday-alternatives' appears to be either a data entry error, a test case, or a case of mistaken identity. Either the company name is incorrect, the URL is incorrect, or 'Wheat State' does not exist as an operational financial services business.
